news.headline: Cupbop expands internationally, entering UAE with a development deal for 10 locations in Dec 2024. Characters: 84
news.summary: A fast-growing Korean BBQ fast-casual chain has revealed plans for expansion, signing a deal to open 10 new locations in the Emirates. Cupbop, known for being the first fast-casual Korean Barbeque in a cup concept in the country, made the announcement in Salt Lake City on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Khruangbin and Lord Huron to headline Outside Festival on May 31 - June 1, 2025 in Denver. Early bird tickets on sale Dec 11.
news.summary: Mark your calendars! Early bird festival tickets and VIP packages for the highly anticipated Outside Festival in downtown Denver will go on sale starting this Wednesday, December 11th. After a successful event last year, the festival presented by Capital One and REI Co-op is back and ready to thrill attendees. With a variety of activities and entertainment, this year's festival promises to be bigger and better. Don't miss out on your chance to secure your spot - get your tickets early!

news.headline: US companies prepare for Trump's tariff plans: 20-60% hikes on Chinese imports, 40% chance of 10-20% universal tariff. Participants strategize to pass costs to customers.
news.summary: The article discusses how U.S. businesses are preparing for President-elect Donald Trump's anticipated tariff plans. The Trump administration is expected to increase tariffs on Chinese imports by an average of 20%, with some non-consumer goods facing hikes as high as 60%. There is also a possibility of additional tariffs on auto imports and a 40% chance of a universal 10%-20% tariff on imports from other countries. Goldman Sachs has outlined three key strategies that companies are considering in response to these tariffs. One plan involves passing on the increased import costs directly to customers, with companies like AutoZone and Best Buy indicating they will likely raise prices to offset tariffs. This approach aims to shift the burden of tariffs onto consumers rather than absorbing the costs internally.

news.headline: Walgreens' share price soars amid talks of potential acquisition by private equity firms.
High Science 420 Mobile partners with Delvin Breaux Sr. Former NFL player & author. Use promo code 'Delvin420' to support his foundation. Goodness of cannabis supported.
news.summary: A retired NFL New Orleans Saints cornerback and published author is collaborating with High Science 420 Mobile to support the Delvin Breaux Sr. Foundation. By using the promo code 'Delvin420,' customers can contribute to this worthy cause. The foundation aims to provide affordable phone services and advocates for the positive impact of cannabis. This partnership was announced in Scottsdale, Arizona on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Wall Street excited for Trump 2.0 comeback; investors optimistic about potential opportunities despite risks.
news.summary: The financial industry is optimistic about the upcoming term of President-elect Donald J. Trump, with many seeing a significant number of opportunities. Despite potential risks, professionals on Wall Street are currently focusing on the positive aspects of his return to power.

news.headline: Inventor from Glenarden, Md., develops LAST DROP accessory to absorb urine leaks for men. Solution for comfort and hygiene.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Glenarden, Maryland shared the inspiration behind creating the LAST DROP, stating, "I had prostate cancer and needed a better way to absorb any urine leaks." The innovative design aims to address issues related to odors, stains, and potential discomfort. The invention targets individuals facing similar challenges and aims to enhance their quality of life.

news.headline: Billings Catholic Schools in Montana have seen benefits following adoption of PowerSchool MyPowerHub for improved communication.
news.summary: In Folsom, California, PowerSchool, a prominent provider of cloud-based software for K-12 education in North America, revealed that Billings Catholic Schools (BCS) in Billings, Montana, has improved school-community connections by embracing PowerSchool MyPowerHub. This secure and centralized engagement hub aims to strengthen communication and collaboration between families and schools. BCS has implemented MyPowerHub, receiving praise from the BCS community for its positive impact on interactions.

news.headline: Microsoft shareholders vote against adding Bitcoin to balance sheet, rejecting proposal.025 characters: 90
news.summary: At Microsoft's annual meeting, shareholders (NASDAQ:MSFT) rejected a proposal to investigate incorporating Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) into the company's balance sheet. This decision halts talks of the tech giant following the trend of holding Bitcoin alongside other corporations. The board had recommended against the motion, titled “Assessment of Investing in Bitcoin,” which was put forth by the National Center for Public Policy Research. This conservative think tank sought to explore the possibility of Microsoft investing in the cryptocurrency. The exact voting numbers were not disclosed.

news.headline: LifeVac celebrates milestone: 2,000 children rescued from choking emergencies.
news.summary: A significant milestone has been achieved by LifeVac, the original choking rescue device, based in Long Island, N.Y. The device has successfully saved 2,000 children from choking emergencies as of December 10, 2024. This achievement highlights the crucial role played by this device in saving lives during choking incidents.

news.headline: CarbiCrete, Aecon, and Lafarge Canada collaborate for low carbon building project in Ontario, setting new sustainable construction standard. CEO of CarbiCrete, Jacob Homiller, leads the project. MONTREAL, PRNewswire, December 6, 2024.
news.summary: A recent trial project in Montreal is establishing a groundbreaking benchmark for eco-friendly construction methods. This initiative was spearheaded by Jacob Homiller, the CEO of CarbiCrete, and supported by Clément Boisselier, Aecon's Senior Advisor for Sustainability and Environment, and Nashat Andraws. The event took place on December 6, 2024. This significant development represents a shift towards sustainable practices in construction and showcases the potential for future projects to prioritize environmental considerations.

news.headline: Fifth Wall partners with Kite Realty Group (NYSE: KRG) for improving built environments. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in New York, Fifth Wall, the leading asset manager dedicated to enhancing, future-proofing, and decarbonizing the built environment, revealed its partnership with Kite Realty Group (NYSE: KRG). Kite Realty Group, a prominent owner-operator known for open-air shopping centers and mixed-use properties, will be part of Fifth Wall's initiatives.

news.headline: Gunvor plans to cease all fuel production at Europort oil refinery in Rotterdam, use site as terminal only - Company Spokesperson.
ADS, a Top 25 Federal Contractor, appoints new board member and restructures executive team for increased collaboration and growth.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance collaboration and drive long-term growth, a renowned military equipment provider based in Virginia Beach, ADS, has revealed significant organizational adjustments. The company, recognized as a Top 25 Federal Contractor, shared news of executive leadership alterations as of December 10, 2024. This strategic move aims to further solidify ADS's position in the industry and foster a more cohesive work environment.

news.headline: Grifols urged by flat-footed investors to change board in shareholders' interest.

Anthony Scaramucci's "The Little Book of Bitcoin," with foreword by Michael Saylor, to be launched in January. Mentions stablecoins, mining, and crypto platforms like Binance and Uniswap. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. praises the book.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the ex-White House communications director and SkyBridge Capital founder, authored "The Little Book of Bitcoin" with a foreword by Michael Saylor, set for January release. The book is a comprehensive guide on digital asset technology's disruptive impact on finance professionals globally. It includes insights on stablecoins like Tether and Circle, and details on Bitcoin and Ethereum mining and staking, alongside popular crypto platforms such as Binance and Uniswap. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. praises the book and Bitcoin on the back cover, highlighting how the technology rectifies monetary issues and promotes individual freedom. For further details, check Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Epinephrine autoinjector market to grow by $2.44B (2024-2028) due to rising allergies and AI impact - Technavio.
news.summary: According to a recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market trends, the global market size for epinephrine autoinjectors is projected to increase by an impressive USD 2.44 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market will experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of over 10.59% during this period.

news.headline: Oil output in US Permian Basin to rise to 6.55 million bpd in December, up from 6.54 million bpd in November; output to decline to 6.48 million bpd in January - EIA.

Regulators aligning with tech sets US up for digital asset growth. Panelists optimistic; shift from headwinds to tailwinds. Exciting potential for growth as regulation evolves. U.S. may accelerate adoption in response to global developments.
news.summary: At Benzinga’s Future of Digital Assets event, experts discussed a positive shift in U.S. policy towards digital assets. Gregg Wysocki highlighted the transition from regulatory challenges to supportive regulations, describing it as a crucial turning point. He emphasized the increased institutional participation due to clearer regulations, envisioning significant investments in the sector. Maredith Hannon also expressed optimism, noting the opportunity for the U.S. to expedite adoption in response to global regulatory trends. This alignment between regulation and technology is expected to drive growth in the digital asset space globally.

news.headline: Inventor from Silver Spring, Md., creates Foamy Feet to protect feet during sports, designed to prevent injuries and bruises.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Silver Spring, Md., shared the inspiration behind the FOAMY FEET, a product designed to safeguard the delicate protruding bones of the feet during sports activities. The innovator aimed to prevent injuries, bruises, and blisters with this creation.

news.headline: XTI Aerospace presents TriFan 600 to FAA for approval.
news.summary: In Englewood, Colorado, on December 10, 2024, XTI Aerospace, Inc. revealed that they held a General Familiarization session for the TriFan 600 with the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA). XTI, listed on Nasdaq as XTIA, is known for its innovative aircraft design. The presentation aimed to showcase the aircraft's capabilities and features to the FAA.

news.headline: Global ready-mix concrete market to grow by $210.44 billion (2024-2028) due to construction boom and AI influence. CAGR over 5.17%.
news.summary: In a recent analysis on AI's impact on markets, it is predicted that the global ready-mix concrete sector will witness significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 210.44 billion between 2024 and 2028. The latest projections from Technavio suggest a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of over 5.17% during this period, highlighting the transformative influence of artificial intelligence on this industry.

news.headline: Ovation TV and Spectrum partner for 8th year, award $100,000 to 10 arts orgs in Spectrum markets nationwide.
news.summary: Ovation TV, the prominent arts network in America, has revealed that they will be granting $100,000 to 10 arts and cultural organizations situated in Spectrum markets across the nation. This announcement was made in Los Angeles on December 10, 2024. Ovation TV has joined hands with Spectrum to present the Stand For The Arts Awards for the year 2024-2025, showcasing their commitment to supporting the arts.

news.headline: PACCAR raises quarterly dividend by 10% to $0.33 per share, payable on March 5, 2025 to stockholders of record by Feb 12.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, PACCAR Inc's Board of Directors has announced a 10% increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $0.30 per share to $0.33 per share. Shareholders of record as of February 12, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 5, 2025. Mark Pigott, the executive chairman, highlighted PACCAR's consistent profitability and shareholder returns over the years, attributing it to the company's leadership in premium quality.

news.headline: PACCAR announces $3 per share extra cash dividend, payable on Jan 8, 2025, to stockholders of record on Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, PACCAR Inc's Board of Directors announced the approval of an additional cash dividend of $3.00 per share. This dividend will be paid out on January 8, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on December 20, 2024. Mark Pigott, the executive chairman of PACCAR, emphasized the company's successful performance in providing high returns to shareholders. This achievement is attributed to their top-notch vehicles, robust expansion in aftermarket parts and financial services, and the effective application of technology to improve customer operations.

news.headline: China Automotive Smart Glass Research Report 2024 highlights advances in dimming glass & antenna tech, with key suppliers & future trends.
news.summary: A new report titled "China Automotive Smart Glass Research Report, 2024" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report focuses on advancements in dimming glass and glass antenna technologies within the automotive smart glass sector. It delves into typical vehicle models, supplier market share, and future trends. Automotive smart glass, a key component of intelligent technology in vehicles, is highlighted in the report. The study provides insights into the industry landscape, with a focus on innovation and market projections.

Pelican Landing in Vero Beach, FL, celebrates holiday traditions with residents in assisted living and memory care, promoting joy and purpose in cooler Florida temperatures.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, Pelican Landing Assisted Living and Memory Care residents are welcoming the holiday season as temperatures drop. They are participating in nostalgic traditions and memorable outings to celebrate special occasions, bringing joy and purpose to their lives.

news.headline: National Press Club demands Guatemala halt criminal proceedings against exiled journalist Juan Luis Font.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Emily Wilkins, the president of the National Press Club, released a statement regarding the arrest warrant issued by Guatemalan authorities for exiled journalist Juan Luis Font. Wilkins emphasized the club's firm demand for the Guatemala's attorney general's office to address the situation. The specific details of the warrant and the circumstances surrounding Font's exile were not elaborated upon in the statement.

news.headline: Microsoft shareholders rejected Bitcoin treasury strategy proposal after board's recommendation. This decision came on Tuesday.
news.summary: The board of Microsoft urged shareholders to oppose a Bitcoin treasury strategy proposal, and on Tuesday, shareholders did exactly that.

news.headline: Eric Trump believes Bitcoin will reach $1 million due to its scarcity and ability to disrupt traditional banking systems. He praises its fixed supply of 21 million coins at the Bitcoin MENA event in Abu Dhabi.
news.summary: Eric Trump recently praised Bitcoin as a groundbreaking asset set to revolutionize traditional banking systems. During the Bitcoin MENA event in Abu Dhabi, he highlighted the cryptocurrency's scarcity, liquidity, and inclusivity, positioning it as a transformative complement to assets like real estate. Trump emphasized Bitcoin's fixed supply of 21 million coins, contrasting this with commodities such as gold, which can increase in supply with higher prices. He expressed confidence in Bitcoin's potential to change the world and disrupt the banking sector significantly. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SAU plans to appeal SACSCOC decision after being removed from membership in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on December 10, 2024, the Southern Association of Colleges and Schools Commission on Colleges (SACSCOC) Board made the decision to expel Saint Augustine's University (SAU) from membership after their annual meeting in Austin, Texas. Despite this action, SACSCOC acknowledged that SAU successfully addressed certain issues...

news.headline: John Clay Wolfe of GIVE ME THE VIN acquires 42 rare cars, worth $2 billion in annual revenue. Up for auction Dec 18.
news.summary: On December 18, the entire lot will be up for auction at the GMTV Garage in Dallas. This event is hosted by John Clay Wolfe, the president and founder of GIVE ME THE VIN™ (GMTV), the leading vehicle wholesaler in the country. GMTV boasts almost $2 billion in annual revenues and holds an A+ rating.

news.headline: Realty ONE Group offers Phoenix agents choice to unaffiliate from NAR, becoming fastest-growing franchisor.

This move comes as part of the brand's commitment to providing a unique and dedicated experience for agents. The specially designed holder offers a unique feature that ensures a clean finish after each use, transforming the bathroom experience.

news.headline: Pokeworks introduces OG Poke Bowl as a limited-time special. Available only from Dec 10. #Poke #Foodie #LimitedTime

Chef Jennifer DiFrancesco, Sodexo's Director of Culinary Innovation, emphasized that 'bold' will be the central theme influencing the evolution of campus dining in 2025.

Munchkin named on Fast Company's 2024 "Brands That Matter" list for its cultural impact, trusted brand status.

The list honors brands making a cultural impact and forming strong connections with consumers. Munchkin is acknowledged for being a trusted brand among parents globally, known for its innovative products and engaging content. This marks the company's inclusion in the fourth annual list by the prestigious publication.

news.headline: Rev Group's stock has surged 64% this year, poised to break out; reports fourth-quarter earnings.
news.summary: Rev Group announced its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday ahead of schedule. The company, known for its success during the Covid-19 pandemic, has seen a remarkable 64% increase in its stock value this year. With this positive momentum, Rev Group is now on the verge of a significant breakthrough in the market.

news.headline: Oracle's stock dropped due to a narrow earnings miss, despite gaining Meta as a customer. AI push shows momentum.Characters: 98
news.summary: After Oracle reported lower-than-expected earnings, its stock experienced a decline in value. Despite this setback, analysts remain optimistic about the company's AI initiatives, noting the ongoing momentum in that area. One notable development is Meta becoming a customer of Oracle. This news was followed by a drop in Oracle's stock price due to the narrower earnings miss. This information was highlighted in an article on a financial news website.

news.headline: Trump's tough mass deportation vow drives prison stocks up; CoreCivic anticipates increased demand for ICE detention beds.
news.summary: The tightening of immigration policies under the Trump administration may lead to an increased demand for ICE detention beds and the potential renewal of a previous contract. CoreCivic has indicated a willingness to engage in discussions ahead of time. The recent strong stance on mass deportations by Trump has resulted in a surge in stock prices for prison companies.

news.headline: Raydium surpasses Uniswap in DEX volumes for 2 consecutive months, according to Messari.
news.summary: Raydium, a decentralized exchange native to Solana, surpassed Uniswap in trading volumes during October and November. This data was reported by Messari, indicating a substantial increase in activity on the platform during those months.

news.headline: Thomas F. Rosenbaum appointed Chairman of Society for Science's Board of Trustees, Feng Zhang as Vice Chairman.
news.summary: Feng Zhang, currently holding the position of James and Patricia Poitras Professor in Neuroscience at MIT, has been appointed as Vice Chairman. The Society for Science revealed that Thomas F. Rosenbaum has been chosen as the Chair of its Board of Trustees. This announcement was made in Washington on December 10, 2024. Rosenbaum, who is the ninth president of the organization, will be taking on this new role.

news.headline: Hydron Energy partners with FortisBC to evaluate INTRUPTor™ gas solution - collaboration agreement signed.
news.summary: A collaboration agreement has been signed between Hydron Energy Inc. and FortisBC Energy Inc. in North Vancouver, BC on December 10, 2024. Hydron Energy Inc., known for their affordable INTRUPTor™ gas upgrading solution, aims to work with FortisBC to assess the potential use of their technology. This collaboration indicates a significant step for both companies in exploring cleaner fuel options.

news.headline: Sport Clips Haircuts partners with Military Spouse Employment to offer new career opportunities - Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A company founded by veterans has partnered with the Military Spouse Employment Partnership in Georgetown, Texas on December 10, 2024. Sport Clips Haircuts, the top provider of men's and boys' hair care services in the nation, joined forces with this initiative.

news.headline: Newtek Bank, N.A. and Apiture win IBSi Global FinTech Innovation Award for effective partnership. Deposits tripled in 2023.
news.summary: Newtek Bank, N.A. experienced a significant increase in deposits in 2023, seeing a tripling in their deposit numbers. This growth was facilitated through the utilization of the Apiture Digital Banking Platform.
